text: Pyrrole derivatives R0120 Anti-HIV-1 Activity of Pyrryl Aryl Sulfone (PAS) Derivatives: Synthesis and SAR 27-104 M Studies of Novel Esters and Amides at the Position 2 of the Pyrrole Nucleus.— Of al tested compounds, compound (IVa) shows the highest antivirl activity.
